titleStmt.title: SII 9.701: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 701. (A.R. No. 23 of 1910.) ON A SLAB SET UP TO THE EAST OF THE BASAVESVARA TEMPLE AT KUNTHURU, KOLLEGAL TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: This record is dated Śaka 1434, Āṅgirasa, Jyēshṭha, śu. 15, corresponding to A.D. 1512 May 30, Sunday (not verifiable), in the reign of the Ummattūr chief, Immaḍi-Chikkarāya-Oḍeya, son of Mahāvīra-Nañjarāya-Oḍeya, who is stated to have made a sarvamānya gift of the village Kuntūru to the Sālūr-Śānta-maṭha for providing food and clothing to 50 Oḍeyars of the Śivāchāra sect. Mention is made of various taxes and of the boundaries of the village situated in Hadināḍu, which the chief was ruling.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrījayābhyudayaśālivāhana śakavaruṣa 1434 saṁdu varttamāna Āṁgirasaṁvatsarada
jēṣṭa śuddha 15 ralu śrīma(ṁ)nmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara pasāḷihanuma javājikō
ḷāhaḷa ghēṇaṁkacakrēśvara Arasaṁkasūnegāṟa gajebēṭegāṟa śrīmanmahāvīra naṁjarāyaOḍeyara ku
mārarū śrīmanmahāvīra yiṁmaḍi cikarāyaOḍeyaru . svasti samastapraśastisahita śrīnandinātha bhruṁginātha vī
rabhadradēvaru mukhyavāda sajjana suddhaśivācārasaṁpannarumappa dyavāpruthuvīmahāmahattinoḷagāda sālūra śāṁtadēvaru
sihvāsanakke Ayivattu voḍeyaranu Ārōgaṇe vastra kappaḍadinda pūje māḍi kūḍikoṁḍu yihadakkāgi Ā sā
lūra śāṁtadēvaru voḷagāgi mahāmattige bhaktipūrvvakavāgi Ācaṁdrārkkasthāyiyāgi sarvamānyavāgi koṭṭa
dharmmaśāsanada kramaveṁteṁdeḍe nāu Āḷuva hadināḍa Āgarakke saluva kuṁtura grāmada catussīme voḷagu
ḷa gade bejjalu tōṭa tuḍike kāluvaḷi Āruvan mēluvan magga manevaṇa kāṇike bēḍige binugudeṟe kuṁbāṟade
ṟe Āḍedeṟe gaṇācāra viṣēṣa vikrayakā suṁkabeṭṭa suṁkasthāvara Ūbhayamārgga voḷavāru ho
ṟavāru suṁka modalāda sarvvasvāmya samasta bbeyapura sahitavāda kuṁtūru grāmakke yēnu U
ḷḷa sarvasvāmyavanu Āgumāḍikoṁḍu prāku tārake saṁjātavāgi salluttidda beddalu ga ¥ 1 ¥ 4 ṟa
ḍu ga 8 ¥ 0 manevaṇa 6 ¥ 4 gadde ga 60 8 Ø 3 carā Ādāya ga 6 ¥ 1 . Aḍḍa Ī grāmakke huṭṭi
da Āgarakke saluttida hattisuṁka Ubha suṁkadiṁda ga 15 taḷamane dēvadāna koḍagi
hoṁnu hoṁbaḷi hoṁge hāga suṁka ṟu ruhonu yippaṇavaḍḍada kāluvaḷi sahitavāda
kuṁtūra grāmavanū ga 216 ¥ 3 . sarvva pūrvvakavāgi Ācaṁdrārkasthāyuvāgi koṭṭa kāluvaḷi
sahitavāda kuṁtūra grāmada catussīme nyādiyāgi peraṁbaḷiya holada kallina hattira nairu
tyamukhavāda liṁgamudraya kallu du paḍuvaṇa vāma liṁgamudreya kallu Alliṁdaṁ te
nka naḍadu mūḍalāgi kottale paḍu mudreya kallu Alliṁdaṁ teṁka naḍadu huttaru tippinalli pa
ḍuva mukhavāda liṁgamudre teṁka naḍadu hosakaṭṭeya daṁḍina hādiyiṁ teṁkalu paḍu
va mukhavāda liṁgamudreya kallu Alliṁ mūḍalāgi kottalebeṭe carumana keṟeyalli paḍuva mukhavā
da liṁgamudreya kallu Alliṁda teṁ keṟeyalli paḍuva mukhavāda liṁgamudreya kallu Alliṁdaṁ te
ṁka naḍaduṁ tuyyala tāḷakeṟeya kōḍiyalli paḍuva mukhavāda liṁgamudreya kallu Alliṁdaṁ taṁka naḍa
du mūḍalāgi kottale tūyyala keṟeyēryya tāḷalli paḍuva mukhavāda liṁgamudreyakallu Alliṁdaṁ teṁ
ka naḍadu vaḍavārada giḍuvinalli paḍuva mukhavāda liṁgamudreya kallu Āgnēyādiyāgi paḍavalu naḍadu vāyā
vyamukhadāda liṁgamudreya kallu Alliṁdaṁ paḍuva naḍadu teṁkalu kottaleyāgi vīrappana kaṭṭeya teṁkaḷavaṭṭina
lli baḍaga mukhavāda liṁgamudreya kallu Alliṁdaṁ paḍuva naḍadu teṁkalāgi kottale baḍaga mukhavāda liṁ
gamudreya kallu Alliṁdaṁ paḍuva naḍadu baḍaga mukhavāda liṁgamudreya kallu Alliṁdaṁ paḍuva naḍa
du Ōṇitalahinalli baḍaga mukhavāda liṁgamudreya kallu Alliṁdaṁ paḍuva naḍadu voṁṭṭi holada mūḍaṇa ta
lahinalli baḍaga mukhavāda liṁgamudreya kallu Alliṁdaṁ paḍuva naḍadu taṁkalāgi kottale baḍaga mukha
da liṁgamudreya kallu Alliṁdaṁ paḍuva naḍadu baḍagamukhavāda liṁgamudreya kallu Alliṁdam teṁkalu ko
ttale taṁmaḍi holada talabinalli baḍagamukhavāda liṁgamudreya kallu Alliṁdaṁ paḍuva naḍedu kesautūra
yelle bēvinatāḷalli baḍagamukhavāda liṁgamudreya kallu Alliṁdaṁ paḍuva naḍadu vuppina mōḷeyalli baḍaga mu
khavāda liṁgamudreya kallu Alliṁdaṁ paḍuva naḍedu hesagadatāḷalli yīśānyamukhavādaliṁgamudreya kallu
Alliṁdaṁ baḍaga naḍedu kuṁṭugaṭṭeyalli mūḍamukhavāda liṁgamudreya kallu Alliṁdaṁ baḍaga naḍedu pa
ḍuvalāgi kottale mūḍamukhavāda liṁgamudreya kallu Alliṁdaṁ baḍaga naḍadu hoṁgetāḷalli mūḍamukhavā
da liṁgamudreya kallu Alliṁdaṁ paḍuvalāgi kotale gōṇitāḷalli mūḍamukhavāda liṁgamudreya kallu A
lliṁdaṁ baḍaga naḍadu karitāḷalli mūḍamukhavāda liṁgamudreya kallu Alliṁda baḍaga naḍadu cillakavāḍi yelle
tāḷetāḷalli mūḍamukhavāda liṁgamudreya kallu Alliṁdaṁ baḍaga naḍadu paḍavalu kottale baḍagamukhavāda liṁga
mudreya kallu Alliṁdaṁ paḍuva naḍadu kottaletāḷalli baḍagamukhavāda liṁgamudreya kallu Alliṁdaṁ
baḍaga naḍadu mūḍamukhavāda liṁgamudreya kallu Allindaṁ baḍaga naḍadu paḍuvalāgi kottale baḍagamukha
vāda liṁgamudreya kallu Alliṁdaṁ baḍaga naḍadu mūḍamukhavāda liṁgamudreya kallu Alliṁdaṁ baḍaga naḍadu
mūḍamukhavāda liṁgamudreya kallu Alliṁdaṁ baḍaga naḍadu mūḍa Ūrahādiya huṭṭugallinalli mūḍa mukhavāda
liṁgamudreya kallu Alliṁdaṁ baḍaga naḍadu vāyavyadalli Āgnēyamukhavāda liṁgamudreya kallu Alliṁdaṁ mūḍa naḍadu mū
ḍamukhavāda liṁgamudre kallu Alliṁdaṁ baḍaga naḍadu hattitāḷakeṟeya tavinalli mūḍa mukhavāda liṁgamudre
kallu Alliṁdaṁ vōreyāgi mūḍalu naḍadu haraḷakeṟeya vottinalli teṁkamukhavada liṁgamudre kalluA hattire
mūḍalāgi liṁgamudreya kallu Alliṁdaṁ baḍaga
ttale bagutana hosakeṟeyalli huṭṭugallinalu liṁgamudre kallu

hiremāliṁgi yelle
teṁkamukhavāda liṁgamu
dreya kallu Alliṁdaṁ baḍaga naḍa
du huṭṭugalliṁ teṁkamukhavāda
liṁgamudreya kallu Alliṁdaṁ �yo
śānyavāgi mūḍa naḍadu daṁḍina
hādi mēreyāgi beṭṭada ba
vōradalli teṁkamukhavāda liṁga
mudreya kallu Alliṁdaṁ kalaūra ye
lle Alliṁdaṁ mūḍa naḍadu māḷige
daṁḍi lli teṁkamukha
vāda liṁgamudre kallu Alliṁdaṁ
muḍa naḍadu kaṁbāḷi daṁḍina hadi
yalli teṁkamukhavāda liṁgamu
dre kallu Alliṁdaṁ mūḍa naḍadu
bare haḷḷadalli liṁ
gamudre kallu
naḍadu tāḷeko
vāda liṁgamu
da naḍadu mā
Ūra
mū
diṁ mūḍa naḍa
kāḍali nairutya
mudre kallu �yośā
navāgi yi
llu meyikāḍa sahitavāda
kuṁtūra catussīme voḷaguḷa gruhā
rāma kṣētra nidhi nikṣēpa jala pāṣā
ṇa Akṣīṇi Āgāmi siddha sādhyagaḷe
ṁba Aṣṭabhōgatējasāmya sarvva
samasta baḷi sahitavāgi Ā Iṁ
maḍi cikkarāyavoḍeyaru
Ā sālūra śāṁta
maṭhake bhaktipū sarvva
mānyavāgi rkastāyi
�yo grāma
dhāya jaṁga
koḍagi moda
pūrvva
garada
māṟidarū
makke suṁka
śrī . dānapālanayō
dānāchrēyōnupālanaṁ dā
tsargamavāpnōti pālanādaccu
taṁ padaṁ . svadattaṁ paradattāṁ vā
yō harēta vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭirvaruṣa
sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi [ḥ .*]
dattādviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānupā
lanaṁ paradattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niḥ
palaṁ bhavēt . śatruṇāpi kṛtō dharmaḥ
pālanīyō manīṣibhiḥ śatrurēva hi śatruḥsyā
ddharmmaśśatrurna kasyacit . sāmā(ṁ)nyōyaṁ
dharmmasēturnrupāṇāṁ kālē kālē pāla
nīyōdbhavadbhiḥ . sarvvānētānbhāvinaḥ pārtthi
vēṁdrānbhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāma
caṁdraḥ . śrīsōmēśvara
cikkacāriya hastada likhita .
Digital edition of SII 9.701 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
